Filled in 0 bare reference(s) with reFill 2. Please see [[User_talk:Mr_Serjeant_Buzfuz#Confusing_refill2]] for further context. I disagree on this revertation. Clearly, this is a case of duplicated citations with only small changes to the name of the references, and that's pretty much all. And if that is still not good, then go to the talk page of this article to ask someone else to fix it, because your revertations are unproductive for this article.

Undid revision 1107269291 by [[Special:Contributions/Qwertyxp2000|Qwertyxp2000]]. If you don't know if the changes made by ReFill aren't right, you shouldn't be expecting other editors to come along and fix your mess.  As the [[Wikipedia:reFill]] article says:  "You are responsible for every edit that ReFill 2 suggests so you must take the time to inspect every citation that this tool creates and fix anything that isn't quite right. Do not make work for other editors to clean up."
Filled in 0 bare reference(s) with reFill 2. It is an attempt at fixing the references. If it is incorrect, please correct it yourself.
